about.title: About Us
about.companyDesc: The company was founded several years ago when its founders noticed a growing need for quality and affordable internet in the country. Recognizing that the internet plays a key role in education, business and everyday life, the Datawave team set itself the task of becoming a reliable provider of digital services. From the very beginning, the company invested significant resources in the development of infrastructure and equipment, paying special attention to fiber optic networks to ensure high speed and connection stability.
about.missionDesc: Datawave's mission is to provide high-quality internet to every resident of Kyrgyzstan, creating a reliable digital environment for learning, work and communication. We strive for development and accessibility, investing in new technologies and expanding coverage even in the most remote regions of the country.
about.advantagesSubtitle: A reliable provider is chosen not only for quality service and a rich range of digital services. What other benefits does Datawave offer to subscribers:
about.li4: modern equipment that can be purchased in installments or rented
about.valuesSubtitle: Success in business is based on the values and principles we share
about.value1: We make the internet not only fast, but also accessible to users across the country, regardless of where they live.
about.value2: Care for service quality is our main task. We regularly update our infrastructure and introduce modern technologies so that every user can enjoy a stable connection.
about.value3: We are always open to feedback, support clients 24/7 and strive to create a friendly service that can be relied upon.

equipment.routerDesc: Gigabit router with 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequencies, supporting 802.11ac Wave2.
equipment.gponDesc: Intelligent optical network terminal, supports dual-band 802.11ac and has high-performance forwarding capabilities ensuring high quality voice, internet and HD video services.
equipment.tvDesc: Digital set-top box T800 with Full HD and 4K support, Wi-Fi, Ethernet and program recording function.
equipment.rentNote: * Rental cost depends on the chosen service package or promotion terms.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1:
We recommend choosing a Wi-Fi router tested and configured by our specialists. We always test the equipment we use for connection, checking its performance on our network under real conditions.

A router or GPON terminal can be rented or purchased for permanent use. The router can also be purchased in installments over 12 months with no overpayments.

If you want to buy a Wi-Fi router yourself, don't rush — it's very important to make the right choice from all available models and brands. Router specifications significantly affect the quality of wireless connection. It would be a pity if the router couldn't provide the tariff speed.

Our specialist will connect your existing router if it is suitable, or will offer a new one.
faq.a2: We have our own technical support service, so you won't have to wait for solutions from offices remote from your region. Support phones: 0707 68 04 04/0558 68 04 04. We work on receiving and processing requests daily 24/7. We are on duty supporting communication nodes around the clock. At any time you can leave a question or help request via Chat on the website or write to us on WhatsApp. We process 100% of requests.
faq.q3: How to find out if there is a technical possibility to connect to Datawave?
faq.a3: Simply leave a request on the website, our manager will check the technical availability and call you back.
faq.q4: Can I connect a static IP?
faq.a4: Yes, you can do this in your Personal Account. The cost of a Static IP address is 250 som/month.
